overview: Heir to a real-estate dynasty, David Marks lives in the shadow of his father, Sanford. He takes a chance at true love when he meets Katie, a woman of modest origins who sees David's real worth as a person, not just his family's wealth. Against his father's wishes, David marries Katie. They plan to build a life together, but their once-loving relationship deteriorates after David gives in to his father's demand to work in the family business. After Katie goes missing, David is suspected of murder. Inspired by the most notorious missing person’s case in New York history, a love story and mystery set against the backdrop of a real estate dynasty in the 1980s.
tagline: The perfect love story. Until it became the perfect crime.
title: All Good Things
